name: Turkey Almond Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 stalk Celery Cut Into Thin Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut turkey into 1-inch cubes.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat cooking spray in a large skillet or wok.
4. Add oil and heat until hot over medium-high heat.
5. Add turkey and stir-fry until no longer pink, about 3 minutes.
6. Add onion and celery; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add mushrooms; stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add pea pods; stir-fry for a bit longer (about 1 more minute).
9. Mix broth, cornstarch, soy sauce, and ginger in a bowl.
10. Stir into the turkey mixture.
11. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
12. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
13. Top with almonds.
14. Serve over rice.
